records.question: Which TV channels in the United Kingdom aired the cartoon titled Journey to the Center of the Bat! directed by Michael Chang?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE cartoon.title = 'Journey to the Center of the Bat!' AND cartoon.directed_by = 'Michael Chang' AND tv_channel.country = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on cartoon.Channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.Country) like '%united kingdom%' and lower(cartoon.Title) like '%journey to the center of the bat!%' and lower(cartoon.Directed_by) like '%michael chang%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find TV channels in the United Kingdom that aired a cartoon with the specified title and director. We'll join TV_Channel and Cartoon on the channel ID, filter by country, title, and director, and select tv_channel.id.

records.question: Which TV channels that are not pay-per-view and have music content included in the Sky Famiglia package feature cartoons written by Todd Casey, directed by Brandon Vietti, originally aired in 2009, and with a production code of at least 111.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND cartoon.written_by = 'Todd Casey' AND cartoon.directed_by = 'Brandon Vietti' AND cartoon.original_air_date LIKE '%2009%' AND cartoon.production_code >= 111.0 AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on cartoon.channel = tv_channel.id where tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'No' and lower(tv_channel.content) like '%music%' and lower(tv_channel.package_option) like '%sky famiglia%' and lower(cartoon.written_by) like '%todd casey%' and lower(cartoon.directed_by) like '%brandon vietti%' and cartoon.original_air_date like '2009%' and cast(cartoon.production_code as real) >= 111.0 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join TV_Channel and Cartoon on channel ID, filter for non-PPV channels with music content in the Sky Famiglia package, and cartoons written by Todd Casey, directed by Brandon Vietti, aired in 2009, and production code >= 111.0.

records.question: Which Italian tv channels that are not high definition have cartoons?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join cartoon on tv_channel.id = cartoon.Channel where lower(tv_channel.Country) like '%italian%' and lower(tv_channel.Hight_definition_TV) = 'no' limit 5;
records.thought: We need Italian TV channels (Country like '%italian%'), that are not high definition (Hight_definition_TV = 'No'), and have at least one cartoon (join with Cartoon on Channel).

records.question: Which TV channels in English with the series name MTV Dance and Sky Famiglia package offer cartoons and have the Game Three episode in their series without pay-per-view?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_series.episode = 'Game Three' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'MTV Dance' AND tv_channel.language = 'English' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join tv_series on tv_series.Channel = tv_channel.id join cartoon on cartoon.Channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.Language) like '%english%' and lower(tv_channel.series_name) like '%mtv dance%' and lower(tv_channel.Package_Option) like '%sky famiglia%' and (tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV is null or tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV = '' or lower(tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV) not like '%true%' and lower(tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV) not like '%yes%') and lower(tv_series.Episode) like '%game three%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need TV channels where Language is English, series_name is MTV Dance, Package_Option includes Sky Famiglia, Pay_per_view_PPV is not true, there is at least one cartoon on the channel, and the channel's series includes an episode named Game Three.

records.question: Which TV channels broadcast in Italian and are based in Italy?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel

records.question: What Sky Famiglia music channels in Italy are part of the Match Music series, have a pixel aspect ratio of 4:3 / 16:9, and are not high definition or pay-per-view?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_channel.country = 'Italy' AND tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_channel.pixel_aspect_ratio_par = '4:3 / 16:9' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'Match Music'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join tv_series on tv_series.Channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.Country) like '%italy%' and lower(tv_channel.Package_Option) like '%sky famiglia%' and lower(tv_channel.Content) like '%music%' and lower(tv_series.series_name) like '%match music%' and lower(tv_channel.Pixel_aspect_ratio_PAR) like '%4:3 / 16:9%' and (lower(tv_channel.Hight_definition_TV) = 'no' or lower(tv_channel.Hight_definition_TV) = 'false' or lower(tv_channel.Hight_definition_TV) = '0') and (lower(tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV) = 'no' or lower(tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV) = 'false' or lower(tv_channel.Pay_per_view_PPV) = '0') limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find TV channels in Italy with 'Sky Famiglia' in the package option, 'music' in the content, part of the 'Match Music' series, pixel aspect ratio '4:3 / 16:9', and not high definition or pay-per-view.

records.question: Which TV channels in the United Kingdom have both TV series and cartoons, where the cartoons are directed by Michael Chang?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE cartoon.directed_by = 'Michael Chang' AND tv_channel.country = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel join tv_series on tv_series.Channel = tv_channel.id join cartoon on cartoon.Channel = tv_channel.id where lower(tv_channel.Country) like '%united kingdom%' and lower(cartoon.Directed_by) like '%michael chang%' group by tv_channel.id limit 5;
records.thought: We need TV channels in the United Kingdom that have both TV series and cartoons, with at least one cartoon directed by Michael Chang. We'll join TV_Channel with both TV_series and Cartoon, filter by country and director, and group by channel id to ensure both exist.

records.question: Which MTV Rocks channels that are not high definition, not pay-per-view, and included in the Sky Famiglia package are available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.series_name = 'MTV Rocks' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: select tv_channel.id from tv_channel where lower(series_name) like '%mtv rocks%' and (lower(hight_definition_tv) != 'yes' or hight_definition_tv is null) and (lower(pay_per_view_ppv) != 'yes' or pay_per_view_ppv is null) and lower(package_option) like '%sky famiglia%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter TV_Channel rows where series_name contains 'mtv rocks', Hight_definition_TV is not 'yes', Pay_per_view_PPV is not 'yes', and Package_Option contains 'sky famiglia'.

records.question: Which TV channels have content that is music and belong to the series name MTV Live HD?
records.gold_sql:
